title: pelargonium × oenanthifolium
intro: Pelargonium × oenanthifolium, also known as Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including sore throats, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pelargonium × oenanthifolium include its ability to soothe coughs and reduce fever, as well as its potential to improve digestion and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
